rule: MC1R E/e epistatic to ASIP A/a (Rieder 2001 / UC Davis VGL): e/e->chestnut, E_A_->bay, E_aa->black
tier: DEPLOYED-RULE INTEGRATION on a non-human OBSERVED label (clears the label-first gate IF colour is independently observed)
anti_circular_gate: colour MUST be independently observed, not genotype-derived
caveats: colour must be INDEPENDENTLY OBSERVED (caller asserts this) -- else the score is circular
this RE-CONFIRMS a deployed rule (VGL/Rieder); near-100% concordance is expected -- the informative signal is any DISCORDANT cell (a rule-breaker)
